content:
💡 OpenGait | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Developing and evaluating novel gait recognition models.
✨ Key Features: • Flexible and extensible framework • Supports designing and comparing custom gait recognition models • Facilitates comparison with state-of-the-art methods • Includes tutorials for datasets like GaitLU-1M and SUSTech1K • Active development with recent publications and model releases (e.g., BiggerGait, LidarGait++, DenoisingGait)
📖 Summary: OpenGait is a Python-based framework designed for flexible and extensible gait recognition. It allows researchers to easily design and compare their own models against state-of-the-art methods, facilitating advancements in human identification through walking patterns.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 CF-Hero | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Discovering the origin IP addresses of Cloudflare-protected web applications.
✨ Key Features: • Multi-source intelligence gathering • DNS reconnaissance (current and historical) • Associated domain discovery • Integration with search engines (ZoomEye, Censys, Shodan) • Utilizes SecurityTrails historical records
📖 Summary: CF-Hero is a Go-based reconnaissance tool designed to uncover the origin IP addresses of web applications protected by Cloudflare. It leverages multiple intelligence sources and DNS reconnaissance techniques to identify and validate potential origin IPs, aiming to bypass Cloudflare's protection.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 localsend | Dart
🎯 Primary Use Case: Securely and directly sharing files and messages between devices on the same local network without internet dependency.
✨ Key Features: • Open-source and free • Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS) • Secure file and message sharing • Local network transfer (no internet required) • REST API and HTTPS encryption
📖 Summary: LocalSend is a free, open-source, cross-platform application designed for secure file and message sharing between nearby devices over a local network. It operates without requiring an internet connection or relying on third-party servers, utilizing a REST API and HTTPS encryption for secure communication.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 museeks | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: A desktop application for playing and managing music files with a focus on simplicity and a clean user interface.
✨ Key Features: • Cross-platform music player (Linux, macOS, Windows) • Supported audio formats: mp3, mp4, m4a/aac, flac, wav, ogg, 3gpp • Library auto-refresh • Playlists • Queue management
📖 Summary: Museeks is a simple, clean, and cross-platform music player built with Tauri and React. It offers essential music playback features like library management, playlists, queue control, and playback speed adjustments, aiming for a user-friendly experience across Linux, macOS, and Windows.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 InnerTune | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide an enhanced, ad-free music listening experience for YouTube Music on Android devices, with advanced playback and customization features.
✨ Key Features: • Ad-free YouTube Music playback • Background playback • Search songs, videos, albums, and playlists • Login support • Cache and download songs for offline playback
📖 Summary: InnerTune is an Android application that provides a Material 3-themed client for YouTube Music. It allows users to stream music from YouTube Music without ads, offering features like background playback, offline downloads, synchronized lyrics, and Android Auto support.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 glide | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Providing an efficient, keyboard-centric web browsing experience by extending the Firefox browser.
✨ Key Features: • Keyboard navigation • Modal based keymaps • TypeScript configuration • Web extensions API support • Fuzzy tab manager
📖 Summary: Glide Browser is an extensible, keyboard-focused web browser built on Firefox. It aims to provide a highly efficient browsing experience for users who prefer keyboard navigation, offering features like modal keymaps, fuzzy tab management, and site-specific settings.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
